forecast.name: Today
forecast.shortForecast: Partly Sunny then Rain Showers Likely
forecast.detailedForecast: Rain showers likely after 3pm. Partly sunny. High near 75, with temperatures falling to around 71 in the afternoon. Southwest wind 6 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms then Patchy Fog
forecast.detailedForecast: Rain showers before 8pm, then showers and thunderstorms between 8pm and midnight, then patchy fog and a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 59. South southwest wind 10 to 17 mph, with gusts as high as 28 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between 1 and 2 inches possible.

forecast.name: Thursday
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 2pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 71. West wind 13 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

sections.header: Traffic Impact: The intersection will be closed to all through traffic
sections.content: . Please follow the posted detour route during construction.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
